SUMMARY

A brief description of the feature you would like.

MOTIVATION

Why this feature would be useful. Describe the problem it solves or the workflow it improves.

PROPOSED SOLUTION

How you think this could work. Include CLI examples if applicable.

ALTERNATIVES CONSIDERED

Any other approaches you have thought about.
